items.headline: Tovar's struggles against fastballs continue in Rockies' loss to Braves

news_items.headline: Tigers' Skubal to have surgery on left elbow
news_items.summary: Tigers ace and two-time defending American League Cy Young Award winner Tarik Skubal will need surgery for loose bodies in his left elbow, manager A.J. Hinch said.

news_items.headline: Longtime Yankees radio voice Sterling dies at 87
news_items.summary: John Sterling, the radio voice of the New York Yankees for parts of 36 seasons, has died. He was 87.

news_items.headline: Boone: Sterling a 'giant' who 'did it his own way'...
news_items.summary: "A giant in the sport," Yankees manager Aaron Boone said in reflecting on the life of John Sterling, the legendary radio broadcaster who died Monday at the age of 87. Aaron Judge said Sterling "brought the New York theater to the ballpark."

news_items.headline: Mariners sit Raleigh (side) for third straight gam...
news_items.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh is out of the starting lineup for the third straight game with a sore right side, manager Dan Wilson said Monday.

news_items.headline: Marlins prospect Mack makes MLB debut vs. Phils
news_items.summary: On Monday afternoon, the Miami Marlins promoted highly-rated catcher Joe Mack, 23, the club's No. 3 prospect according to ESPN's Kiley McDaniel, from Triple-A in time for him to make his MLB debut in the series finale against the Philadelphia Phillies.

news_items.headline: Brewers' Chourio, Vaughn back after hand injuries
news_items.summary: The Brewers are getting some badly needed punch back in their lineup with Jackson Chourio and Andrew Vaughn returning from fractured bones in their left hands.

news_items.headline: 📈 Top 10 prospect rankings for all 30 teams
news_items.summary: Who is rising in every major league farm system a month into the season? Kiley McDaniel digs in.

news_items.headline: Man stabbed to death at Busch Stadium hours after Cardinals' loss to Dodgers
news_items.summary: A 65-year-old man was arrested on Monday after the incident, which officials said took place between two members of a cleaning crew.

news_items.summary: TONIGHT’S GAME: The Houston Astros (14-21) will wear their City Connect uniforms tonight as they welcome in the rival Los Angeles Dodgers (21-13) for the first game of a three-game series at Daikin Park. Veteran reliever LHP Steven Okert (0-0, 4.20 ERA) will get the start for the Astros as an opener tonight opposite the […]

news_items.headline: Game Discussion for St. Louis Cardinals vs Milwaukee Brewers Monday
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals will begin one of the most important early season series as their NL central rivals Milwaukee Brewers come to town. Kyle Leahy (3-3, 5.52 ERA, 22 SO) will get the ball for the St. Louis Cardinals while those dastardly Brewers will start Chad Patrick (2-1, 2.57 ERA, 16 SO). First pitch is scheduled for 6:45pm […]
